company: Tazmo Co., Ltd. (blog data labels this ticker as TOWA, but TOWA Corporation trades as 6315.T; the June 9 price of 3,560 JPY +0.56% matches Tazmo)
newsSinceJun6: No material company news since June 6, 2026. Tazmo's latest disclosures predate the window (Q1 FY12/26 results May 15; improved wafer debonding tool May 7; D2W hybrid-bonding tech Jan 29). Material data-integrity flag: ticker/company mismatch - 6266.T is Tazmo, not TOWA (6315.T), so the page's HBM compression-molding thesis may be attached to the wrong price series. Tazmo guides FY12/26 operating profit down 24.5% to 3.6B yen against a +72% YTD share run.

sources.label: Yahoo Finance Japan - Tazmo 6266.T quote and disclosures
Kabuyoho - Tazmo (6266) earnings progress and timely disclosures
Investing.com - TOWA (6315.T) guides 17% sales rise in FY3/27 (relevant if thesis meant TOWA)

verdicts.rankRationale: No new evidence since June 6 and a flat tape today (+0.56%), so yesterday's hold stands; the -1 is rerating drift - a +72% YTD run with FY12/26 operating profit guided down 24.5% leaves thin residual alpha at rank 14. Confidence is haircut because the page identifies 6266.T as TOWA (actually 6315.T) while the price series is Tazmo's; the listing should be re-pointed before any rank action.
verdicts.bull: If the intended exposure is the HBM/advanced-packaging equipment bottleneck, the underlying theme is intact - TOWA (6315.T) holds ~80-90% share in HBM compression molding, and Tazmo itself has D2W hybrid-bonding and wafer debonding tools leveraged to chiplet packaging.
verdicts.neutral: Sub-$0.4B market cap, selective edge/packaging exposure, no fresh orders or design wins disclosed in the window; the stock drifts with the Japan SPE tape until Q2 results or a packaging order datapoint.
verdicts.bear: Tazmo's own FY12/26 guidance calls for operating profit down 24.5% after a -19.4% FY12/25; a +72% YTD rerating against declining earnings is the classic post-rerating chase this list penalizes, and the ticker/company mix-up means the thesis may not even describe the security being ranked.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Q2 FY12/26 results / order disclosures (and, if the thesis is really TOWA 6315.T, HBM compression-molding order acceleration into FY3/27 H2).
verdicts.primaryRisk: Earnings de-rating as guided profit decline collides with a 72% YTD run; data error leaves the blog ranking the wrong company for the stated HBM/OSAT thesis.
